Variation

Capture final field delivery for this project: installed route first, then any new actual-use line items.

1. Route Geometry

Provide the installed route

Upload a GeoJSON file or paste GeoJSON containing a final LineString. Skip this if route capture is not needed for the submission.

Leave blank to auto-compute from the route coordinates.

2. Revised Line Items

Add new actual-use items

Use this section for additions discovered during delivery. Approved quote items are not preloaded here.

Description Qty Unit Amount Actions
No revised line items yet. Add one above if the field work required additions.

Tax amount
0.00
Total
0.00
These items are submitted with the variation for review. Leave this section empty if there were no additions beyond the approved quote.
3. Submit

Send final closeout for review

Submit revised line items alone, or include route geometry when it is relevant.

Edit revised item

These edits stay local until you submit the variation.
